query:
-- Service 1: Yiros Albion - update service ID 285 (has phone 0755317386 which is NOT the Albion one)
-- The Albion service (07 3262 5890 / AVC000114712291) needs to be matched to a Yiros service stub
-- Service 285 has phone 0755317386 which is a different Yiros location
-- Update service 285 with the correct phone (it already has a phone, so this is a different service)
-- We need to find which Yiros stub matches 07 3262 5890

-- First update: service 28 (Zambrero Essendon AVC000178025232) - already matched, just confirm plan name
UPDATE services SET 
  planName = 'Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic',
  monthlyCost = '93.00',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Plan: Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic. Cost: $93.00. NOTE: Confirm with Ella Tolentino if Zambrero Essendon has offboarded.')
WHERE id = 28;

-- Update service 31 (Rumi Persian Restaurant AVC400038259684) - already matched
UPDATE services SET
  planName = 'Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic',
  monthlyCost = '93.00',
  locationAddress = 'U 2, 21A SUNSHINE BVD, BROADBEACH WATERS, QLD, 4218',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Plan: Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic. Cost: $93.00. NOTE: Address flagged as possibly residential - confirm with Alfredo. DID confirmed as Rumi.')
WHERE id = 31;

-- Update service 305 (duplicate Zambrero Essendon - merge notes)
UPDATE services SET
  connectionId = 'AVC000178025232',
  planName = 'Telstra Upfront Internet Plan Basic',
  monthlyCost = '93.00',
  discoveryNotes = CONCAT(COALESCE(discoveryNotes, ''), '\n[Telstra Invoice TTI20189793254 Mar-Apr 2026] Duplicate record for Zambrero Essendon - consider merging with service ID 28. AVC: AVC000178025232.')
WHERE id = 305;
